title: お待たせしました里帰り～星見凱旋記～ 4話 星見市の人達へ

script.text: 結局、麻奈がシーパラでライブをしたのは

translations.en: In the end‚ Mana performing a live at Sea Paradise

script.text: その一度きりになったが……

translations.en: only happened that one time‚ but…

script.text: 同じ場所で琴乃達が里帰りライブをやることに

translations.en: For Kotono and the others to do a homecoming live at the same place

script.text: なるなんて、運命を感じるな

translations.en: really feels like fate.

script.text: そうですね……。私もお姉ちゃんに負けないくらい

translations.en: That's right… I also have to work hard so I can

script.text: お客さんを楽しませられるように頑張らないと

translations.en: entertain the audience as much as my sister.

script.text: お話を聞かせてくれて、ありがとうございました

translations.en: Thank you for telling me that story.

script.text: おかげでライブに向けて一段と気合いが入りました

translations.en: Thanks to that‚ I'm even more motivated for the live.

script.text: それで……一つ思いついたことがあるんですが

translations.en: And… there's something I thought of.

script.text: お願いしてもいいですか？

translations.en: May I ask a favor?

script.text: もちろんだ。遠慮なく言ってくれ

translations.en: Of course. Don't hesitate to ask.

script.text: 私達をずっと応援してくれた星見市のファンの皆さんに

translations.en: To the fans in Hoshimi City who have always supported us

script.text: 感謝の気持ちを表すような……

translations.en: I want to express our gratitude…

script.text: アイドルとして成長した姿を見せられるような

translations.en: and show how we've grown as idols

script.text: 特別な曲を作りたいです

translations.en: by creating a special song.

script.text: ――数日後

translations.en: ――Several days later

script.text: わーい、シーパラだー！！

translations.en: Yay~ it's Sea Paradise!!

script.text: 今日は思いっきり遊んじゃうよー！

translations.en: I'm going to play to my heart's content today~!

script.text: 遊ぶのは構わないけど、はしゃぎ過ぎないでよ

translations.en: Playing is fine‚ but don't get too carried away.

script.text: 今日は曲作りの参考にするために来たんだから

translations.en: We came here today to gather references for songwriting.

script.text: はーい！

translations.en: Okay~!

script.text: それにしても、急に琴乃ちゃんから

translations.en: Even so‚ I was surprised when Kotono-chan

script.text: シーパラに誘われた時は驚いたよ

translations.en: suddenly invited us to Sea Paradise.

script.text: この間、お姉ちゃんの話を聞いて思ったの

translations.en: After hearing my sister's story the other day‚ I thought

script.text: 実際にその場で体験しないと気付けないこともあるって

translations.en: there are things you can only realize by actually experiencing them in person.

script.text: お姉ちゃんがライブ直前にシーパラで遊んだのは

translations.en: The reason my sister played at Sea Paradise right before her live

script.text: きっとそれを感じるためだったのよ

translations.en: was probably to feel that.

script.text: 麻奈ちゃんはただ私達と

translations.en: I think Mana-chan just

script.text: 遊びたかっただけな気もするけど……

translations.en: wanted to play with us though…

script.text: そういう訳だから、今日はみんなでシーパラを下見して

translations.en: That's why today we'll all scout Sea Paradise together

script.text: ここで歌うのにぴったりな新曲のヒントを掴むわよ

translations.en: and get hints for a new song that's perfect to sing here.

script.text: と言っても、お仕事が忙しくて

translations.en: Though with everyone's busy work schedules

script.text: 四人しか集まれなかったけどね

translations.en: only four of us could gather.

script.text: そうなんだよね～。すずにゃんも「私抜きで

translations.en: That's right~. Suzu-nyan also said "It's unfair to go to

script.text: シーパラなんてずるいですわ」って怒ってたよ

translations.en: Sea Paradise without me" and was angry.

script.text: 渚ちゃんも「琴乃ちゃんと一緒にコツメカワウソと

translations.en: Nagisa-chan was also disappointed saying "I wanted to

script.text: 握手をしたかった」って落ち込んでたわ

translations.en: shake hands with the small-clawed otters together with Kotono-chan."

script.text: よーし！　来られなかったみんなの分まで

translations.en: Alright! For everyone who couldn't come

script.text: シーパラを遊び尽くすよー！

translations.en: let's play at Sea Paradise to our hearts' content~!

script.text: えいえいおー！

translations.en: Hip hip hooray!

script.text: ……遊ぶのは構わないけど

translations.en: …Playing is fine‚ but please

script.text: ちゃんと新曲のことも考えてね？

translations.en: think about the new song properly too‚ okay?

script.text: ――数時間後

translations.en: ――Several hours later

script.text: はぁ～、シーパラは楽しいね～

translations.en: Ahh~‚ Sea Paradise is so fun~.

script.text: 行きたい場所が沢山あって、全然飽きないよ

translations.en: There are so many places I want to go‚ I never get bored.

script.text: シーパラを楽しみ過ぎてほっぺたが緩んでるわよ

translations.en: You're enjoying Sea Paradise so much‚ you can’t stop smiling.

script.text: 仕事のことを忘れてないわよね？

translations.en: You haven't forgotten about work‚ have you?

script.text: もちろんだよ！　いろいろ見て回りながら

translations.en: Of course! While looking around at various things

script.text: コラボ企画を考えてたんだ。例えば……

translations.en: I was thinking about collaboration plans. For example…

script.text: 歩いてると、たまにアナウンスが聞こえてくるでしょ？

translations.en: When you walk around‚ you sometimes hear announcements‚ right?

script.text: あのアナウンス、前回もやらせてもらったよね

translations.en: We got to do those announcements last time too‚ right?

script.text: うん、渚と一緒に島内アナウンスで

translations.en: Yeah‚ I remember doing island-wide announcements

script.text: シーパラの施設の案内をしたのを覚えてる

translations.en: with Nagisa introducing Sea Paradise's facilities.

script.text: それ、今度のコラボでもやらせてもらおうよ！

translations.en: Let's ask to do that for this collaboration too!

script.text: 芽衣、島内アナウンスのいいアイデアを思いついたんだ

translations.en: Mei thought of a good idea for the island announcements.

script.text: みんなの好きなオススメスポットを紹介するの

translations.en: We'll introduce everyone's favorite recommended spots.

script.text: たとえば芽衣なら……ワッフル屋さん！

translations.en: For example‚ for Mei… the waffle shop!

script.text: ここのワッフル屋さん、甘くて柔らかくて

translations.en: The waffles here are sweet and fluffy‚

script.text: いろんなフレーバーがあって美味しいんだよ～

translations.en: and they come in lots of flavors—so yummy~

script.text: じゃあ、私は深海魚のコーナーかな

translations.en: Then for me‚ maybe the deep-sea fish corner.

script.text: 深海魚って可愛いよね！

translations.en: Deep-sea fish are cute‚ aren't they!

script.text: 可愛いかしら……

translations.en: Are they cute…

script.text: 他のみんなのオススメも聞いてみたいわね。きっと

translations.en: I'd like to hear everyone else's recommendations too. I'm sure

script.text: 雫ちゃんは釣り堀で、千紗ちゃんは……お化け屋敷？

translations.en: Shizuku-chan would pick the fishing pond‚ and Chisa-chan… the haunted house?

script.text: 怜ちゃんはブリの水槽で決まりだね！

translations.en: Rei-chan would definitely pick the yellowtail tank!

script.text: 怜に怒られるわよ

translations.en: Rei will get angry at you.

script.text: 琴乃ちゃんのオススメスポットは？

translations.en: What's your recommended spot‚ Kotono-chan?

script.text: 私は……海の動物達が出るショーかな。小さい頃

translations.en: For me… maybe the shows with sea animals. When I was little

script.text: お姉ちゃんと一緒に見たことを今でも覚えてるわ

translations.en: I still remember watching them together with my sister.

script.text: そう言えば前回のシーパラコラボでは

translations.en: Come to think of it‚ during the last Sea Paradise collaboration

script.text: 私達の曲に合わせてイルカが踊ってくれたわね

translations.en: the dolphins danced to our songs.

script.text: 可愛かったよね～、お客さんも凄く喜んでたよ

translations.en: They were so cute~‚ the audience was really delighted.

script.text: 今回もイルカさんと共演したいな～ 。……はっ！

translations.en: I want to perform with the dolphins this time too~. …Oh!

script.text: イルカさんを見れば新曲のアイデアも思いつくかも！

translations.en: If we watch the dolphins‚ we might get ideas for the new song!

script.text: そうね、もうすぐイルカショーが始まる時間だから

translations.en: That's right‚ it's almost time for the dolphin show to start.

script.text: みんなで見に行きましょうか

translations.en: So shall we all go watch it?

script.text: ごめんなさい。私は行きたい所があるから

translations.en: I'm sorry. I have somewhere I want to go

script.text: みんなは先に行っててくれる？

translations.en: so could you all go ahead?

script.text: いいけど……どこに行くの？

translations.en: That's fine‚ but… where are you going?

script.text: 私達も付き合うわよ？

translations.en: We'll come with you too.

script.text: ありがとうございます

translations.en: Thank you.

script.text: でも、あそこには私一人で行きたいから大丈夫です

translations.en: But I want to go there alone‚ so it's okay.

script.text: 確かこの辺に……

translations.en: It should be around here somewhere…

script.text: あった……お姉ちゃんのサイン……

translations.en: Found it… my sister's autograph…

script.text: 前回のコラボの時、渚と二人でサインを探し回ったっけ

translations.en: During the last collaboration‚ Nagisa and I searched all over for autographs.

script.text: すずが見つけられなかったって悔しがっていたのよね

translations.en: Suzu was frustrated that she couldn't find one.

script.text: お姉ちゃん……私達、またここでライブをするの

translations.en: Sister… we're going to do a live here again.

script.text: 今回は思いを込めた新曲を作ろうって話し合ってるんだ

translations.en: This time we're discussing creating a new song filled with our feelings.

script.text: 感謝の気持ち……お姉ちゃんの分まで

translations.en: Our feelings of gratitude… even your share

script.text: 応援してくれた星見市のみんなに届けてくるからね

translations.en: I'll deliver to everyone in Hoshimi City who supported us.
